推荐场景: 派对后聊天｜确认昨天遇到的人
60秒任务: 「遇到谁」：过去事件时间线；A=重复确认后完成；B=猜测/乱确认翻车。
目标功能: 过去时｜事件顺序｜人物地点动作｜结果｜简单原因
场景族: 真实成人生活场景｜公共空间｜工作/学习空间｜家庭空间｜线上场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Who did you meet yesterday?（询问人物）
I met my friend.（遇见朋友）
I saw my teacher at the station.（人物+地点）
We talked for ten minutes.（互动时长）
She helped me with my bag.（帮助）
He was in a hurry.（状态）
Did you know him?（确认关系）
No, I didn’t know him.（否定）
I called my mom later.（后续行动）
We had coffee together.（共同活动）
I was happy to see her.（感受）
Then we went to the cafe.（顺序）
I forgot his name.（小问题）
Can you remind me?（请求提醒）
It was nice to meet again.（总结）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: friend, teacher, station, bag, mom, coffee, cafe, name, phone, minute
Verbs: met, saw, talked, helped, called, forgot, reminded, went
Adjectives: happy, busy, kind, late, nice
Time / Place: yesterday, later, together, at the station, for ten minutes
Chunks: in a hurry, had coffee, forgot his name, meet again, remind me
